home.tagline: Just speak — your voice is all you need
home.meetLana: Meet Lana — your AI nurse assistant
home.wakeLana: Say "Hi Lana" to wake her up, or tap here. She can book appointments, read reports, fill forms, call the clinic and more — all by voice!
home.ourServicesDetail:
General check-up
Blood test & X-ray
ECG & specialist referral
home.voiceGuideDetails:
Help for commands.
Say "Book" to start.
Fully hands-free.
home.accessibilityStatement: Accessibility Statement: Commission a formal accessibility audit against WCAG 2.1 AA and ensure compliance with applicable local data protection regulations for patient health data.
home.voiceHint: Say "Book" to make an appointment, or "Report" to check your results.
home.helpBubble: I can help you book an appointment or check your report. Which would you like?

booking.title: Book an appointment
booking.subtitle: Speak each field — AI understands and fills the form for you

placeholders.name: Say: "My name is..."
placeholders.notes: Say "Dictate" then speak notes, or type here...

msg.allFieldsFilled: All fields filled! Say "Confirm booking" to finish.
msg.emptyFields: Some required fields are still empty. Please fill in all fields before confirming.
msg.retryType: Still having trouble. Please type the {field} in the field below, or say "Skip".
msg.retryTry: I heard "{text}" but could not understand {field}. Try: {example}

speech.allFieldsFilled: All fields completed. Say confirm booking to finish.
speech.emptyFields: Please fill in all required fields first.

report.title: Examination reports
report.subtitle: Say "Read aloud" or ask a question about your results
report.listHint:
Say report name to open.
Say "Read aloud" to hear.

msg.opened: Opened: {type}. Say "Read aloud" to hear results.
msg.readComplete: Report read complete. Ask a question or say another report name.
msg.askAnother: Say another question or "Read aloud" for the full report.
msg.answerError: Could not fetch answer. Please try again.
msg.help: Say "Read aloud", or a report name: "Blood test", "Check-up", "X-ray".

speech.opened: Opened {type}. Say read aloud to hear results.

report.flowHint: Say "Read aloud", choose a report, or ask a question

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Say "Call us", "Email", "Dictate" to speak a message, or "Send message"
contact.subject: Subject
contact.dictateHint: Say "Dictate" to speak — AI will transcribe automatically.

placeholders.name: e.g. Sarah Ali
placeholders.message: Say "Dictate" to speak your message, or type here...

msg.formCleared: Form cleared. Say "Dictate" to speak your message.
msg.email: Our email: hello@voicecare.com. We reply within 1 business day.
msg.recorded: Message recorded. Say "Send message" or press Send.
msg.help: Say "Dictate" to speak your message, "Call us", "Email" or "Address".
msg.dictationOn: Dictation on. Speak your message. Say "Done" when finished.
msg.required: Please fill in your name, email and message before sending.
msg.sent: Message sent! We will reply to {name} within one business day.

speech.phone: Our phone number is plus 00 000 000 000. Open Monday to Friday 8am to 6pm.
speech.email: Our email is hello at voicecare dot com.
speech.address: We are at 12 Healthcare Avenue, Kuala Lumpur.
speech.dictationOn: Dictation mode on. Speak your message and say done when finished.
speech.required: Please fill in all required fields.
speech.sent: Message sent. We will reply within one business day.

auth.voicePrompt: Say "Sign in" or "Create account" to begin.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your health records
auth.terms: By signing up you agree to VoiceCare's terms. Your data is kept strictly private.
auth.haveAccount: Have an account? Sign in
auth.switchSignIn: Switching to Sign in. Please enter your details.
auth.switchSignUp: Switching to Sign up. Let's create your account.
auth.help: Say "Sign in" to log in or "Create account" to register.
auth.heard: I heard "{text}". Say "Sign in" or "Create account".
auth.welcomeSpeech: Welcome to VoiceCare. Say sign in or create account to begin.

lana.micBody: VoiceCare is designed to be completely hands-free. Allow microphone once — then just say "Hi Lana" any time.
lana.micBlocked: Blocked. Click the lock icon in the address bar, set Microphone to Allow, then refresh.
lana.greetHome: Hi! I am Lana, your VoiceCare nurse. Say Book to make an appointment, or Report to check your results.
lana.greetBook: Hi! I am on the booking page. Say Fill form and I will guide you through everything step by step.
lana.greetReport: Hi! Your reports are here. Say a report name or Read aloud to hear your results.
lana.greetHistory: Hi! This is your appointment history. Say Upcoming or Completed to filter.
lana.greetContact: Hi! Say Dictate to speak a message, or Call clinic to phone us.
lana.greetSignin: Hi! Say Sign in or Create account to continue.
lana.greetDefault: Hi! I am Lana. How can I help?
lana.callingClinic: Calling VoiceCare clinic now. The number is plus 60 3 2345 6789.
lana.helpText: I can book appointments by asking you questions, check your reports, call the clinic, navigate any page, fill in forms, scroll, and click buttons. Just tell me what you need.
lana.bookingGo: Let me take you to the booking page and guide you through it.
lana.bookingIntro: I will help you book an appointment. I will ask you a few questions.
lana.bookingSummary: All done! Here is your booking summary: {summary}. Say Confirm booking to complete, or tell me if anything needs to change.
lana.buttonNotFound: I could not find that button. Please tap it directly.
lana.tryMainCommands: Try saying Book, Report, or Help.
lana.notSure: Not sure about that. Try: Book, Report, History, Call clinic, or Help.

sex.ask: What is your sex? Male or female?

dob.ask: What is your date of birth?

ic.ask: What is your IC or passport number?

service.ask: Which service do you need? Blood test, check-up, X-ray, ECG, or specialist?

date.ask: What is your preferred appointment date?

r1.note: Overall normal. Cholesterol slightly elevated — dietary adjustment and follow-up in 3 months recommended.

r2.note: All routine checks are within expected range. Keep your current activity and sleep routine.

r3.note: No acute abnormality detected. Follow up only if cough, fever, or breathing symptoms continue.
